name: Falafel, Vegetarian Style
recipeInstructions: Dice the onion into 1/4 pieces. Tear the French bread slices into large pieces and soak in cold water to cover. Dice the cucumbers and tomatoes and shred lettuce into small strips for garnish after the sandwich is done. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Blend garlic, half of the onion, and parsley in a blender until finely minced. Add chickpeas and blend until finely chopped and pasty. Add lemon juice, cumin, basil, coriander, thyme, and Tabasco sauce. Squeeze the water out of the bread and add to the blender. Blend until well mixed. Form the mixture into 16 balls. Flatten each ball to form a half-inch thick patty and dredge in flour. Place patties on a lightly greased baking sheet. Bake for 10 minutes. Turn patties and bake another 10 minutes. Remove from oven. In a heavy large skillet, heat half the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add patties and fry until golden brown on bottom. Turn patties and add the remainder of oil, swirling it so it comes in contact with all patties. Fry until brown and crispy, then drain on paper towels. To serve: Cut off about one-third of each pita round and open to form a pocket. Fill each pocket with 4 falafel balls. Garnish with lettuce, tomato, onion, cucumber, and the sauces.
